title: Elliott Multi-Purpose Window Squeegee perfect for streak free cleaning on Windows, shower screens, cars and mirrors, Aluminium frame housing a 40cm rubber squeegee with an ergonomic Grey Handle.
features: Rubber blade – Easily achieve a streak free finish on windows, shower screens and tiles with the use of this easy to use window squeegee.
Versatile – The Elliott Window Squeegee is multi-purpose and can be used for windows, cars, mirrors, tiles, shower screens, surfaces or floors indoors or outdoors.
Ergonomic – Smooth and easily held handle for safe grip and easy to store handle. Save money on using window cleaning services and use elliotts window squeegee for a professional finish.
Durable and long-lasting – the elliotts windows squeegee is built to last with its steel frame housing a 40cm rubber blade. Its tough enough to handle all domestic and commercial cleaning needs.
Cost effective - our household essential tool is suitable for all budget types.
description: From the brand Previous page Elliott is a British cleaning brand with over 65 years of experience. Founded in 1948, we began with traditional brushware, including scrubbing brushes for floors and stairs. Today, we offer stylish, efficient products for modern households, helping you achieve a spotless home. Laundry Pegs Clothes Lines Wooden Brushes Spray Bottles Dustpan and Brushes Dusters Brooms Wooden Broom Heads Window Squeeges Toilet Brushes and Plungers Next page
